reason: The remediation only edits a PAM password quality configuration file to set the minclass parameter. This is a standard STIG hardening step, does not require reboot, and does not affect core services or boot configuration. The change may cause password change failures for non‑compliant passwords, but it will not lock out existing logins.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Users with passwords not meeting the new class requirement may be forced to reset passwords; Potential for temporary authentication failures until passwords are updated
